Since low season and good planning of the tour guide it was nowhere full and very pleasant. Afterwards we had a nice canoe trip through the mango forests and hollowed out limestone cliffs. For lunch we then stopped for the floating village. Finally, we looked at a famous temple in the mountain and arrived at the hotel after 9h really happy. Jasmine we make a great travel companion. Thanks again.
reviews.title: A very nice Tsg
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text:
Also booked with Khao Lak Land Discovery a very nice and long day trip "Amazing 3 Temple Tour Khao Lak" with German speaking tour guide. Pick up at the hotel in Khao Lak at around 8am in a mini-bus.

We first went to the temple Wat Manee Sri Mahathat, which is located on a main road, then we had the extensive lunch in the group in a beautiful Thai restaurant on a lake with typical Thai dishes and rice, as well as fruit for dessert. The drinks are exclusive.

In the early afternoon we drove to the royal Wat Bang Riang temple with extensive park and other interesting Buddha statues, as well as free-living monkeys. Since this temple is located on a mountain and in the hilly surroundings, you had to make some effort. But it was still feasible.

The last temple was the Naga cave temple Wat Tham Phaya Nakarad, where you have to climb the open and closed caves a bit via simpler stairs and metal ladders. This is a bit more strenuous because partly without shoes. Once at the top there is a very great view of the surrounding area.

There was extensive information about each temple. Between the slightly longer bus rides there was additional information from the tour guide. At each stop there were soft drinks or water from the driver.
Driver and tour guide were very nice and friendly.

We stayed at the hotel again in Khao Lak in the late afternoon.

We thought it was a very interesting trip to get to know the (south) Thai religion and culture.
reviews.title: Very nice day trip to 3 different temples in Phang Nga region

reviews.text:
We booked this somewhat expensive but very nice and professionally conducted day trip to the Surin Islands via Khao Lak Land Discovery. The actual boat trip was carried out by another renowned company.

After a very early pick-up at the hotel in Khao Lak about 5am you were on time for sunrise at the pier in Khao Lak, had to check in there, there was a quick breakfast and the first information about the day trip in our local language in German.

After about an hour it started. They went barefoot on the speedboat catamaran. The crew and tour guides introduced themselves.

There was mind. 2 rounds of snorkeling on great reefs, as well as 2 shore excursions, once at the See-Nomaden village and a beach and bathing stop on the neighboring island with additional late lunch buffet. On board were constantly soft drinks and water, as well as fresh fruit or cookies.
Highlights on this island were the wild animals such as monkeys, birds or warblers.
In the See-Nomaden-Village and during the bathing stop, things and souvenirs could also be bought if necessary.

The snorkeling equipment was provided. The crew and guides were nice and friendly and happy to help. So this trip was a great successful experience.

After the return journey, we stopped briefly at the pier where we could change our clothes and use the toilet facilities again if necessary before being taken back to the hotels.

Except for getting up early, it was a great day.
reviews.title: Very nice boat trip with snorkeling and visits to the Surin Islands

reviews.text:
You must have experienced. Were very impressed. Our guide Oli explained everything great. We were in good hands with Him. Thanks for that. 

Roland and Renate
reviews.title: Khao Lak elephant bathing. Were tie impressed.

reviews.text:
The excursions are well organized and the tour guides are all very good.
We have booked 6 excursions in 3 years through Khao Lak Land Discovery and are already planning for next year
reviews.title: Again and again

reviews.text:
We booked 2 days Khao Sok Wildlife from Switzerland. Already then we were advised by Lars very competently and patiently.

The trip was awesome. Transport went smoothly (and on time). Our two-day travel guidine Ariz, a Thai woman with super knowledge of German accompanied us attentively, competently, reliably, kindly and with humor throughout the tour. She has great knowledge of flora and fauna. With the longtail boat we went “to the end of the world”. The boatmaster grew up there and knows the lake and the area like his pocket. He was also top.

Our accommodation was really very modest (which we wanted). No running water, no electricity, no iPhone reception, no bath. But pure nature and tranquility or x-different nature and animal sounds. Everything was clean and the crew in the lodge spoiled us culinary. We slept in an overwater bamboo cabin (only mattress, blanket and pillow).

The tours that Ariz did with us were impressive and fully decelerating. We felt safe and secure and like we were alone in this world.

In summary: Ingenious, unforgettable, impressive, unique, beautiful and highly recommended!!!!

Many thanks to ALL!!!!

Silvia & Reto
reviews.title: Once beautiful! ̈

reviews.text: The trip was a dream and the highlight of my Thailand trip. The excursion was very well organized.  The pickup was super punctual. First I went to the Rock Tree House Resort where I came across 1 couple and 1 family who became my travelling companions for 2 days. On the way to Cheow Lan Lake we continued to a temple cave with bats and flying dogs. Also a non-venomous snake and large silk spider crossed our path. Once at the lake, we took a longtail boat for almost 2 hours through incredible nature with imposing granite cliffs and rainforest. The raft cabins were simple but much better than I expected and in an incomparably idyllic location. There was a double bed mattress with mosquito net and a bench as a shelf. Electricity was available from 6pm to about 9pm. After a swim break we went on the first boat safari and after the delicious meal again. The night was accompanied by jungle sounds. In the morning at 6am we set off on a heretical safari, which our fabulous guide Rolo has made a unique experience. We've seen so many animals: Spectacled lemurs and gibbons, a Malaysian bear, warblers, sambar deer, eagles, kingfishers, rhinoceros and other birds. The soundscape alone was magnificent.  Unfortunately, we only heard elephants, but that's the case with wildlife.  Thanks Rolo, if I am in Thailand again, I will definitely repeat the tour.
reviews.title: Incredibly beautiful

reviews.text:
Everything perfectly organized, our guide of the pigeon Dutchman was great. 

Very nice and unforgettable trip. 

Looking forward to the next tour already booked
reviews.title: Khao Sok day trip

reviews.text: We have been ordering our airport transfer for years and also some of our tours at Khao Lak Landdiscovery and it always works out great. The Highligt this year was the 2 day trip to the reservoir, these are experiences for life, just 1a. A big thank you to our tour guide Rolo, he knows his stuff and gives the guests great experiences. We are already looking forward to the next tour.
reviews.title: Unforgettable experiences

reviews.text: Just great! We had booked Surin Island. super organized from hotel pickup to drop off. We would recommend Surin to anyone. I just upload the pictures that say more than 1000 words🤗🤗
reviews.title: Surin Island

reviews.text:
The drive across the lake with the landscape is already fantastic! Shortly before the accommodation we were surprised with heavy rain, rainforest stop! We were served a simple but delicious lunch and then we had some free time. Swimming in the lake or kayaking, just relax in nature! The accommodation was simple but did it. The jetty to the huts cost me a lot to overcome at first but after a few times it was ok. It's not for foot weak people! Our guide Rolo was great, he lives for this national park! Unfortunately, we didn't want to see elephants, but it's not his fault. We could still see some animals! The return trip the next day would be a bit damp from above but did not bother us! 
For nature lovers it is the right tour!
reviews.title: Unforgettable excursion

reviews.text: In 2023, during our first vacation in Thailand, we booked some excursions through Khao Lak Land Discovery, all of which were just wonderful. We were particularly impressed by the tour “Khao Sok Wildlife 2 days” with our guide Rolo. This experience was so impressive that we decided to travel to Khao Lak again in November 2024 to repeat the tour. This year we booked the tour “Khao Sok National Park 3 Days Wildlife and Treehouse Tour” and thanks to our guide Rolo we had unforgettable experiences again.
reviews.title: Mega experience

reviews.text:
Our two-day trip to Khao Sok National Park was an absolute dream! Thanks to our guide Rolo, who was not only incredibly nice but also very experienced, we learned a lot about nature and felt comfortable at all times.

The highlight, in addition to spending the night in the idyllic bamboo huts on the lake, was the encounter with an elephant – a magical moment! We were also able to observe many more animals and enjoy the spectacular scenery.

A perfectly organized tour that we can highly recommend to any nature lover. Thank you, Rolo!
reviews.title: Unforgettable excursion

reviews.text: A truly unique experience. The excursion was super organized and everything worked out fine - from the pickup, to the rides, the overnight stay, the excursions and the return trip. The national park is incredibly beautiful and you can see a lot - in our case: Samba deer, Javanese monkeys, gaur, warblers, eagles, rhino birds, spectacled langurs, an elephant and even a tapir. Rolo Our guide always wanted to get the best possible for us and was full of enthusiasm. We would really recommend this trip to anyone!
reviews.title: A unique experience

reviews.text:
It was a really eventful trip with Rolo. We saw a lot and felt like we had arrived in the deepest Thailand for 3 days!
Rolo took very good care of everyone and made an extremely effort to ensure that we see animals on the safari. Afterwards he provided us with his photos free of charge. Overall, it was a mega experience that we will never forget. Thank you!
reviews.title: Mega experience

reviews.text: The overnight stay in the raft huts was unique, pure nature. Our guide went to great lengths to discover the animals.
reviews.title: Wildlife pur

reviews.text:
We’ve already done several tours at Khao Lak Land Discovery in 2023. We liked it so much that we flew back to Khao Lak especially in 2024 for the Khao Sok tour of several days. So we went through this tour more or less twice.
Everything went smoothly. Our guide was super friendly and explained a lot! Very happy to come back. We look forward to our next vacation in Khao Lak in the future.
reviews.title: Simply recommended!

reviews.text: An unforgettable trip with Rolo. We've seen a hell of a lot of animals. You can tell that Rolo doesn't see his tour as work....he is with heart ❤️ & soul....always happy. We will come back, but then we will not only book the 2-day tour!
reviews.title: We will be back - We promised

reviews.text:
We did the tour in April as a family with our 2 sons (8&9). 
We stayed one night in the tree house. It was a great experience. 
At noon we took another tour on the raft. 
The next day we went for a swim with elephants and then went to bamboo huts in khao Sok National Park. On the way there Rolo took a lot of time on our boat tour to observe wild animals. 
Very worthwhile tour!
reviews.title: Great excursion

reviews.text:
Our tour guide Volker was simply outstanding! From start to finish, the tour was perfectly organized. He inspired us with his extensive knowledge of the culture, history and impressive temple complexes. 
Especially impressive was his warm and friendly nature, which made us feel immediately at ease.

The stops at the temples and the viewpoints were well planned, and we had enough time to explore everything in peace and take great photos. 

Even small details, such as cold drinks and refreshing towels, have made the trip even more enjoyable. 

Volker always responded to our questions and explained everything understandably and with a lot of enthusiasm.

Lunch at a typical Thai restaurant with unique views was also a special experience.

This day trip was one of the highlights of our trip to Khao Lak, and we owe this mainly to our fantastic guide Volker. 

We can highly recommend the tour with Volker!

Thank you for that!

Kristina and Ante
reviews.title: An unforgettable day trip!

reviews.text:
We are just thrilled! 
We booked 3 tours at Khao Lak Discovery and it was just great. 
It started when I booked. The people in the company took the time to sit down with us and find the right tours for us. Everyone was mega friendly. 
For each tour we had perfectly coordinated guides who you noticed that they do the tours with heart. 
Value for money was really good. 
The organization was top! 
We can really recommend Khao Lak Safari, Similan Island and the two day tour still Khao Sok. 
Here you can collect incredibly beautiful memories for your holiday.
reviews.title: Just thrilled

reviews.text: We had a great guide, we experienced exciting, entertaining insights into Buddhism and the organization was perfect.
reviews.title: Here you can get to know the culture very closely

reviews.text:
The organization was great. 
The guide ( Volker ) and the driver are very nice. There was always something to drink and wet wipes. 
Volker explained everything great, you can tell he's there with his heart.
reviews.title: Great trip!

reviews.text:
We booked the tour at the hotel and were picked up punctually at 7:20 am. After about 1 hour we arrived at the port and got on a long tail boat. From there we went through the mangrove swamps to another boat dock where a paddle boat was waiting for us. With the paddle guide we went through various caves and along the rocks, which was an absolute dream on its own, despite the start of the high season hardly any people on the road. The fact that there were so few people on the road was because we did the paddle tour first and then went to James Bond Rock. All other tours do it the other way around.
From there, to the James Bond Rock, there was much more going on here, nothing, the more despite that we had enough time to take a close look at the rock and the surrounding area and take beautiful photos. For us an absolute dream and highly recommended. Afterwards we went to the floating city for lunch, which had a great variety and actually tasted great. Afterwards we had enough time to shop in the floating city. Afterwards we went on to a temple in a stalactite cave, also worth seeing. Afterwards we went back to the hotels.
For us absolutely top.
reviews.title: An absolute dream trip for us
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text:
We were at Wat Chalong Temple as the Big Buddha was closed.
Subsequently, we were on the market for a long time and were able to move freely.
reviews.title: Weekly market

reviews.text: We were on our way to a full day trip in Phang Nga Bay. The very early rise was worth it! The speedboat took us from Phuket Harbour to various destinations, including James Bond Rock. The staff of the boat were very friendly and extremely helpful in getting off and boarding, but also in providing drinks and food. An unforgettable day!
reviews.title: Full day excursion, recommended
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text:
Far too long drive over 2 hours. to the temple to Phuket , which is actually superfluous. No drinks (water) in the car , which is included in other excursions. Arrived at the weekend market after almost 4 hours, and about 4 hours walking around there, sometimes too much. 
Wouldn't really recommend such a ride.
reviews.title: Weekend market Phuket

reviews.text: We had our 3. Excursion with Arisara as a guide, she was wonderfully friendly and warm again. She speaks excellent German and English. It started with a longtail boat trip to the famous James Bond Rock where Arisara explained a lot of detailed information about the island and the backgrounds of Thailand. Afterwards we went paddling in the mangroves which was a fantastic experience. Afterwards we were on a floating village which was slightly jarring for our eyes as there next to newly opened coffee shops the old inhabitants live in the poorest conditions (Kulturschok). The food in the restaurant was ok. Finally we went back with the longtail boat and still looked at the monkey temple also here Arisara was detailed in explaining and always considered that nothing happens to anyone. She makes every trip special, if you can ask for her, you will not regret it.
reviews.title: With Arisara as Bond Girl in Phangnga Bay
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text: Great trip with guide Volker, who explained everything very well and provided us with lots of interesting background information. Everything was perfect, and the food in the chosen restaurant with a great view and very good food was also highly recommended. We were also always provided with plenty of drinks.
reviews.title: Very nice cultural excursion with the top guide Volker!

reviews.text:
Unfortunately we were unable to go on our vacation in June 2024 due to FTI insolvency.
We had to cancel the trip... hence my review.

The trip even took my gluten intolerance into account.

reviews.text:
Great trip with lots of information about nature, the country and the people.

reviews.text: Hello, we booked a tour through the hotel with Khao Lak Land Discovery and were more than satisfied. We were with the guide Dominik, who comes from Germany and currently lives in Thailand. We were a mixed group of Germans, Austrians, English, French and Australians. Dominik made an effort in all languages to ensure that everyone understood and he had a lot of background knowledge. The tour was very well organized and there were always enough cold drinks and a delicious lunch. Would recommend it again and again. Thank you and see you soon
reviews.title: Great tour with Khao Lak Land Discovery
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text: Great tour through the rainforest, lots of nature. Vehicles in order, with sun protection. Drinks were also available. Would gladly do it again
reviews.title: We had 2 great tours

reviews.text: All I can say is that I have done this before, was picked up on time and was in a small group and as promised, everything was in German. There was a lot of information and the day flew by and the lunch at the nomad village was really good, I will book here again next time, keep it up. Greetings Andreas
reviews.title: Finally got to know the island where Bond was filmed.
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text: A tour guide with in-depth knowledge of Buddhism, with a lot of joy and dedication. A day I will never forget. Competent and good work.
reviews.title: I would do it again

reviews.text: Great experience with beautiful landscapes, lots of animals and numerous hotspots. Lots of pure nature in one day.
reviews.title: Great experience

reviews.text:
Very poorly organized trip!!!
Pick up at the hotel at 5.20am! (Slogan "The early bird...")
Arrival at the "harbor" at 5.50 a.m. "Harbor" is one big makeshift! Not enough seats for breakfast, everything is very basic.
Because the tides were not taken into account, all the boats are aground and cannot start. Wait until the boats are finally towed free at 8.15 a.m. - so almost 2 hours of waiting!
Access to the boat through mud with sharp-edged stones - no jetties!!!
On the way to the islands, we stopped twice because of engine problems - according to the guide, we had known about it the day before, but we still set out with the same boat.
Due to all the delays, we were much too late at completely overcrowded beaches and snorkeling spots.
Due to the delays, a snorkeling trip had to be canceled entirely!
After the lunch break, we continued on with the supposedly repaired boat. Total breakdown after half an hour. Daring and dangerous transfer to two other boats on the open sea. Luckily, no one was hurt and we were late but at least we were healthy. arrived again.
Exiting the boat was the same as getting on - mud and stones!
The boat crew and guides "tried very hard", but were also visibly frustrated.
I don't want to experience a trip like that again!
The islands are great, and if the organization is good, it's definitely a worthwhile trip. But not recommended with this travel organization at the moment!
reviews.title: Similan Island - not a nice trip!

reviews.text: I went on the Amazing 3 Temples Tour yesterday. A really lovely day with tons of great photo opportunities, lots of information about Buddhism and the culture of Thailand and a delicious lunch with a view. Our small group of 4 guests was provided with cold towels and drinks all day and the driver drove carefully. Thanks to the funny tour guide Sonchay who made this day very special with his friendly, open manner.
reviews.title: Amazing 3 Temples Tour

reviews.text: Unique experience! Thanks to Rolo - he does this tour with passion! We can 100% recommend this tour!
reviews.title: Unique

reviews.text:
We did the tour in mid-December.
The pick-up was great (7am), the driver was on time and there was a German tour guide (Rolo).
As we hadn't had breakfast yet, we were kindly offered the opportunity to have breakfast in the "tree house".
The trip to the huts on the longtail boat was very interesting, and we saw numerous animals on the way there. The accommodations are simple bamboo huts with mattresses and mosquito nets. Not luxury but certainly sufficient for one night.
The actual tour:
After lunch, we went on an exploration tour with our tour guide Rolo and our longtail boat driver Liam. We saw various species of monkeys, deer, various species of birds and elephant tracks. A short hike through the jungle following the elephants' tracks was also included. After that, we went back to the boat to keep looking for elephants and other animals.
After dusk, we drove back to the bamboo huts, where we had dinner.
The next morning we set off early (6am) to look for elephants. We saw a number of tracks on the shore again, but no elephants. Instead, we saw many other animal species, including a gaur, which is only seen very rarely.
After the exploration tour, we returned to the huts at around 10 a.m. and were greeted with breakfast. After that, we had some time to swim in the lake or explore the jungle on our own by canoe. After lunch, we went back with the longtail boat and the van, which dropped us off at our hotel.

In short, we can only recommend this trip to anyone who really wants to observe animals without being disturbed by the crowds of tourists.

A big thank you also goes to Rolo, who is always up for a laugh - a really great guy. He also took pictures of the animals with a camera throughout the tour, which he then sent to us.
5 out of 5 stars!
reviews.title: Two-day trip into the wilderness

reviews.text: Many thanks to our guide. He made these two days an unforgettable experience.
reviews.title: Unique experience

reviews.text: The trip to Phang Nga Bay was run by Khao Lak Land Discovery. The tour was very well organized, we were always at the attractions before the other tour groups arrived. The trip on the Longtai boat, the canoe trip in the mangroves and caves, the James Bond Rock, the sea nomad village of Ko Panyi and the cave temple with the monkey feeding were all very worth seeing. The funny tour guide Tim did a pretty good job, but we would have liked a bit more information here and there. But all in all it was a very nice trip that we can definitely recommend.
reviews.title: Worth seeing trip to Phang Nga Bay
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text: Today we went to the Elephant Park with Somchay and Bird to bathe with the elephants. It was a wonderful experience that we wouldn't want to miss. Our guide was in a great mood, very friendly, humorous and had a lot of information for us and answers to all of our questions - we absolutely recommend the tour. Thank you for the experience :)
reviews.title: Unforgettable experience with the elephants

reviews.text:
Our trip with Khao Lak Land Discovery to the off-road safari in Khao Sak National Park, led by Michael and accompanied by driver Jun, was simply fantastic! Although the weather was not on our side and the boat tour literally fell into the water, this only made our day even more exciting.

Michael was an excellent guide who was not only very knowledgeable about the flora and fauna of the national park, but also always provided a good dose of humor. His knowledge and enthusiasm for nature was infectious, and he made us feel comfortable from the start.

Driver Jun also did a great job guiding us safely and skillfully through the off-road paths of the national park. The canoe tour through the “Little Amazon” was a real highlight despite the rain. The rippling water and lush vegetation created an enchanting backdrop.

The unexpected rain made the day an unforgettable adventure, and we laughed heartily as we paddled through the tropical rainforest. Khao Lak Land Discovery managed to turn what seemed like a mishap into a unique experience.

Overall, this trip was fantastic and highly recommended. We would book it again without hesitation and can recommend Khao Lak Land Discovery, Michael and Jun to anyone who loves the beauty of nature and exciting adventures. Thank you for this unforgettable day!
reviews.title: An adventure in the rain – Unforgettable day with Khao Lak Land Discovery (Michael and Jun)

reviews.text: We took a day trip to the PhiPhi Islands. The driver arrived promptly at 4 a.m. During the 1.5 hours to the port in Phuket, the driver kept collapsing, microsleep = life-threatening! I couldn't relax for a moment. Then we went out on the boat in high waves, the tour should have been cancelled. The tour guide seemed drunk. The rest of the crew were very nice and we saw beautiful places. At Maya Bay, 45 minutes is enough for a photo, because you're not allowed to swim there anyway. I would have preferred to have stayed longer on Krabi, rather than on Bamboo Island where an ice cream costs €4. There are no showers on the island to freshen up for the long journey back.
reviews.title: Dangerous tour. But beautiful places

reviews.text:
We have now made the Surin Island Snorkel Tour on 25.04.23 for the 2nd time after 5 years. We were negatively surprised by the implementation. Already booked from Germany. Online you can advertise with 3 snorkel stops and with your own speedboats. Unfortunately we had to find after the pick up at the hotel that the good was changed and we were not informed about it, a pity, the port for departure with the speedboat was moved from the north port to the south port thereby increasing the journey time from about 75 minutes to a whopping 105 minutes but a snorkel trip was cancelled. On arrival in the port were 2 speedboats planned unfortunately by a third party Kaholak Adventures because 4 people canceled one has quickly painted a boat and stuffed 34 people on a boat, sitting like the herrings next to each other ,absolutely outrageous. Furthermore, there was virtually no information to both excursions . 2. Snorkeling gear was conducted in dirt water statement is at this time always here Dirty should dive what not everyone can .
We didn’t think you could destroy an actual beautiful tour like this.
Sorry Land Discovery if you want to save but not at the expense of tourists your living from you. We are disappointed.
Can't recommend the tour provider anymore
reviews.title: 2. Surin snorkel tour unfortunately not worth the money -disappointed by Discovery

reviews.text:
Thanks to Aris, who not only provided a lot of interesting information in good German, but also incorporated her view of things. It made her look very authentic.
3 temples that contain different currents. The cave temple inhabited by monks (dragon cave temple) , Bang Riang sponsored by the royal family and finally a temple where Hinduism and Buddhism flow in from the north (China) and south (kaew manee Si mahathat). At the first temple you should be good on foot, 240 steps to the first cave. It is also in the description (countless levels), yet some were surprised.
Lunch at the mangroves.
Anyone interested in land, people, culture and religion is in good hands here.
reviews.title: Culture, culture, culture, learning a lot about Buddhism, its manifestations, as well as country and people.

reviews.text: Lars ist ein super Ansprechpartner wenn's um Buchungen geht aber auch das ganze Team ist Top und super nett
reviews.title: Immer wieder super Team

reviews.text: It was a great tour, with a great tour guide, we did other tours, everything worked wonderfully.  Price performance absolute class. With this institution can book with peace of mind Lars makes everything possible if what does not fit in time. Greetings to Khao Lak it was fantastic
reviews.title: Dreamlike tour

reviews.text: Exhausting, since approach from Khao Lak does not manage under 2 hours. And despite the typical Thai driving style, some would say risky. The Big Buddha is worth a visit, even if heavily visited. You can also be blessed by a monk. The Naka Weekend Market is huge, m. M. about 5 times the size of Bang Niang Market. See and eat fish and crustaceans. Bake half the fresh lobster, delicious. But also in meat, vegetables and fruit everything your heart desires. Plus life music. Even the non food area offers more than Khaolak, everything the tourist needs, or not. One could discuss the stay. 40 minutes at Buddha is relatively short (based on the mass of people). We personally don't need 4 hours in the market for food and to stroll through the aisles once. But others may see things differently.
reviews.title: Good new impressions, huge selection of food, but exhausting.

reviews.text: Wir haben die Khao Sok 2 Tage Wildlife Explorer Tour mit Rolo gemacht. Das waren einfach 2 perfekte Tage! Rolo hat die Tour super geführt und alles perfekt erklärt. Die Verpflegung auf der Ranger-Station war super und alle total freundlich.
reviews.title: Einzigartiges Erlebnis

reviews.text: The ride was interesting and entertaining. Two temples were also located in a very beautiful landscape setting. The cornerstones of Buddhism have been explained to us very vividly and entertainingly by our guide Ming. In addition, fresh drinks and a good lunch were always taken care of.
reviews.title: Culture in scenic surroundings

reviews.text:
Wir haben zwei Ausflüge mit KLLD unternommen und waren insgesamt sehr zufrieden. Gute Guides, vor allem auf der zweiten Tour durch Khao Lak mit Elefanten, Bambusfloß, Schildkröten Station wurden wir sehr gut betreut und mit vielen interessanten Informationen versorgt.

Preis Leistung sucht seinesgleichen, gerade mit Kids sehr sehr sehr zu empfehlen.

Grüße an Volker / Somjay
reviews.title: In der Region unübertroffen gut.

reviews.text:
Wir haben im Laufe der letzten Jahre nun zum 5. Mal den Shuttle-Service von
 Khao Lak Discovery  (vom Flughafen hin und zurück nach Khao Lak) genutzt und wir können diesen Service zu 100 % weiterempfehlen.  Von der Reservierung, zur Bestätigung, der Zahlung bin hin zur Abholung in sehr sauberen Fahrzeugen, es hat alles geklappt.  

Herzichen Dank !
reviews.title: Shuttle Service

A very well organized tour .
The destinations were visited very well in time as there was no overcrowding at the spots .
reviews.title: Pure organisation

reviews.text: Our trip was very nice, our guide Ming (speaking super German) was very friendly, helpful and explained everything to us well. He was also able to answer all questions very competently. Lunch during the trip was also very good. This trip is highly recommended.
reviews.title: Great excursion
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text: Wir haben zwei Touren gebucht (khao sok tagestour u. Hong Inseln)und waren sehr zufrieden....Oliver sein Wissen hat uns echt beeindruckte.....wir waren eine feste Truppe von 17 Leuten und er hat sich echt auf alle eingestellt.....die Organisation der Touren war perfekt....wir hatten viele beeindruckende Momente....Dankeschön.....
reviews.title: Unvergessliche Momente

reviews.text:
Our guide, Som Chay, a German with a Thai name, impressed us with his knowledge, especially about Buddhism. But he has also been able to give a lot of information about Thailand and life in Thailand in general. This made the temple tours super interesting and very informative. Although I have been to different places in Thailand several times, I have learned a lot of new things because every question was addressed. 
The driver provided us with soft drinks regularly. Lunch at a beautiful vantage point with a view of Phang-nga Bay also rounded off the trip, although unfortunately it also rained a bit.
This excursion can be recommended without restriction
reviews.title: A very informative, completely successful excursion

reviews.text: Haben einen Ausflug mit Khao Lak Land Discovery gemacht. Sehr schönes Erlebnis, tolle Führung durch unseren Guide.
reviews.title: Gute, kompetente Beratung in deutscher Sprache

reviews.text:
Volker was in a very good mood and gave a lot of information about country/religion/temple - who wants to know more about the country + excellent photo motifs is right here.
The tour is estimated to take about 8 h.
reviews.title: very informative, good mood guaranteed

reviews.text: We have booked a 2-day Safari Tour tree house. The activities were basically fine, but unfortunately our German-speaking guide with Dutch descent made a dent in our minds. He was unmotivated, disinterested and gave us only terse answers when we had questions. During the activities he usually never said anything about it, we had to discover for ourselves. Also, he was never with our group when we had lunch or dinner, he preferred to be alone and roll his cigarettes. The highlight was then at the reservoir. At the landmark with the 3 stones we wanted to take a person photo from the boat, which unfortunately could not because it was too cumbersome for the boat captain. Everyone else around could. We are very disappointed by the 2 days. You could have made more of it, in that sense you could have saved the guide. So we cannot recommend Khao Lak Land Discovery!
reviews.title: Unmotivated guide put a line in our face

reviews.text: A great trip! The off-road track was a real challenge for the driver, which he mastered superbly. The guide answered all the questions. From the canoe we saw monkeys and snakes. But be sure to wear closed shoes and take mosquito spray with you!
reviews.title: Is worth the money

reviews.text: Our guide Volker (som chay) impressed us with his knowledge of the Thai religion as well as its history, which he conveyed to us in a very understandable way. Haven't been through such good leadership. High praise to him and his driver who drove us so safely through an impressive landscape. I'm sure this wasn't the last outing with her organization.
reviews.title: An excursion we don't want to miss

reviews.text:
Dies war unsere dritte Tagestour mit Khao Lak Land Discovery.
Wir hatten für die "Khao Sok Tagestour" wieder den Reiseleiter Tim mit seinem unverwechselbaren Lachen. Wenn man ihn lachen hört, muss man unweigerlich mitlachen.
Wir wurden wieder pünktlich an unserem Hotel mit einem Mini-Bus abgeholt.
Zuerst ging die Tour auf einen authentischen Markt nach Takuapa. Dieser hat uns auch echt gut gefallen.
Dann ging es zu einem Aussichtspunkt im Khao Sok Nationalpark, auch sehr schön.
Das Elefantenbaden war der Hammer! Ein einmaliges Erlebnis, woran ich mich sicher immer erinnern werde.
Das Mittagessen im Rock & Treehouse  war leider nicht so toll. Dieses Resort gehört dem Khao Lak Land Discovery selbst. Die Location selbst ist wunderschön, aber das Essen leider nicht so.
Der Besuch im Affentempel "Wat Tham Panthurat" war leider nichts besonderes. Ich würde sagen, den könnte man auch aus dem Programm streichen, aber das ist meine! Meinung.
Zum Schluss haben wir noch eine Kanufahrt auf dem Sok Fluss gemacht. Ein tolles Erlebnis! 
Die "Paddler" haben während der Pause uns Becher aus Bambus geschnitzt und Kaffee und Tee angeboten, mega 
Ansonsten hat, wie bisher, alles prima geklappt.
reviews.title: Khao Sok Tagestour mit tollem Highlight (Elefantenbaden) und Kanufahrt auf dem Sok

reviews.text:
This was our second day trip with Khao Lak Land Discovery after the 3 temple tour.
Again, we were picked up from our hotel on time and everything else had worked out perfectly again.
We drove our minibus to the jetty for the longtail boat ride. A beautiful drive that took us first through mangrove forests, then to Phang Nga Bay, incl. "James Bond Rocks." Later we changed to paddle boats and went on a great trip through mangroves and caves. Afterwards we took the longtail boat trip to the sea gypsy village at noon (drinks incl.) to eat.
In the afternoon we took the minibus back to a monkey rock temple, which was also very interesting and beautiful.
All in all, the compiled tour was absolutely top! There is no doubt about that at all! Also we were always provided with drinks everywhere. 
Which is why I didn't give a 5 star rating, is a bit due to the tour guide.
Tim was very nice and his laughter is also really infectious, but we were all in the minibus together for over an hour and only when we reached our destination (the dock for the longtail boat) did he introduce himself to us and talk to us for the first time.
The driver was driving okay, too. However, we were thrilled by the other combination on the 3 temple tour, tour guide + extremely attentive driver (kept pushing drinks into our hands, always had a smile on our face and always gave us, after each sight, a refreshing towel, much more.
But as already described, the tour itself was great! and after the tour guide was "a bit thawed?" also absolutely recommended.
reviews.title: Very great tour with many highlights
reviews.review_of: James Bond Phang Nga with canoe Full Day Tour

reviews.text:
We had booked the 3 temple tour and it had all worked out great!
We were picked up on time at our hotel in Khaolak. Our guide Sonjay /Volker was really great!
A German, who is married to a Thai woman, told us soooo much great and interesting in the temples and during the trips. Also we could ask anything, great!
On the whole tour we were superbly looked after. Our nice driver drove very prudently and offered us a cool drink of our choice after each sight, as well as a wet wipe for hands or to refresh.
The lunch with great views, was also very tasty and also here the drinks were incl. 
We booked 3 more day trips through Khaolak Land Discovery. We hope that these will be just as interesting and that everything will continue to go so smoothly....
reviews.title: 3 temples - tour where everything worked out great and you learn a lot

reviews.text: Many thanks to Sonjay (People) for his detailed and interesting travel guide to these three extremely interesting as well as different temples. Through Sonjay, the essence of Buddhism was brought closer to us and perfectly explained for the time frame. It was a pleasure to meet him and experience this tour! Unrestrictedly recommendable!
reviews.title: Impressive and very interesting!

reviews.text: Vielen Dank an das Team, alles perfekt organisiert!, Unsere Guides Tim, Fabio und Oliver super kompetent! Danke nochmals!!

reviews.text: Gute Tour um etwas auf die schnelle von Thailand zu sehen.Der Taxifahrer kam pünktlich und fuhr gut alle Sachen an.Leider hat der Guide an den einzelnen Orten nicht viel erklahrt.Wir wurden regelrecht durchgeführt auch bei den Elefanten war es sehr touristisch der Elefant musste sich etwa alle 30 Minuten vom Platz nach unten begeben um danach gebürstet zu werden dür ca 15 Minuten.Auch das Mittagessen war nicht besonders die Früchte am Schluss waren das Beste.Am Mittag konnte man in der Hotelanlage in einem kleinen Pool noch baden was eine gute Abkühlung war.
reviews.title: Dürftig erklärte Tour mit einem kurtzen Landeseinblick

reviews.text:
We booked the Khao Sok Paddle and Elephant Tour as well as the Island Snorkel Tour. 
Both guides were really great. Reacts flexibly to events, so we had plenty of time. 
And of course you are not alone on the snorkel tour and we were actually the first anywhere as promised. But doesn't want to grind me out what it's like at times when there are normally many tourists in the region. 
There are much cheaper providers, but organization, planning, execution and friendliness of the guides were great.
reviews.title: Planning and guides top !!

reviews.text: Super tolles und entspanntes Erlebnis mit einer professionellen Durchführung. War ein chilliger Tag an tollen Stränden und traumhaften Buchten.
reviews.title: Empfehlenswert

reviews.text: Due to a misunderstanding when booking, our 2-day wildlife tour became a private tour. Nothing better could have happened to us. So we were able to leave out everything we didn’t want and concentrate on wildlife observations from the longtail boat for a total of 11 hours. Rolo, who after a skeptical look at my photographic equipment, provided me with his 300mm lens (which is not a given in any case) has an extraordinary view for the animals of the national park. It's very moving when it suddenly crashes into the bushes and a wild elephant makes its way to the water. We experienced this several times. We could also observe crooks, white-tailed eagles, lingurs and samba deer. Even a fish owl we were able to discover (very briefly). Due to the misunderstanding mentioned above, we did not stay at the normal camp by the lake, but even further in the national park in floating bamboo houses. All in all, these were 2 unforgettable days for us. Rolo took a lot of time for us, explained a lot about Khao Sok Park and the animals that are native to it and also the rangers who do their duty there. On our next Thailand holiday we will definitely be back with Rolo in Khao Sok National Park.
reviews.title: Unforgettable

reviews.text:
Khao Sok 3-Tage-Tour (Baumhaus & Stausee)

Wir hatten drei unvergesslich tolle Tage im Khao Sok Nationalpark verbracht, dank unserer tollen Begleiterin/Guide P.A.

Nach diversen Touren in den letzten Jahren war es das erste mal, dass unser Guide mit Fahrer bereits am Hotel auf uns wartete (sogar deutsch sprach) und nicht wie üblich man selbst noch ewig warten muss- toller Start!

Erfreulicherweise war das nicht nur Zufall sondern P.A. hat die drei Tage super organisiert, ist auf unsere individuellen Wünsche eingegangen und hat uns unglaublich viel zum Park und seinen Tieren erklärt ohne uns dabei mit Infos zu überladen.

Highlights waren natürlich das Baden mit einem Elefanten (kein Elefantenreiten) und die Kanutour am ersten Tag bei der wir viele Affen und Schlangen sahen!

Am zweiten Tag ging es dann mit dem Boot tief in den National park und mein Fazit: WOW! Die Natur ist unglaublich, das Wasser sauber, die Berge gigantisch und die Geräuschkulisse der Tiere unglaublich faszinierend.

Wir waren zu unterschiedlichen Uhrzeiten unterwegs, wodurch wir auch wieder unterschiedliche Eindrücke der Natur am Mittag, am Abend und zum Sonnenaufgang von der Natur und den Tieren erhielten. Highlight war neben vielen Wunderschönen Vogelarten, dass wir in der freien Wildbahn einen Elefanten am Ufer entdeckten.

Tipp: für die Wanderung möglichst feste Schuhe, lange Hosen und lange Socken anziehen. Warum? Es gibt Blutegel, die sich auf eure Knöchel freuen 😁 natürlich hatte ich das nicht dabei, aber P.A. hat mich mit einem Zitronenspray versorgt das die Egel nicht mögen und mich von einem befreit, der mich doch erwischte - DANKE nochmal für die Rettung 😂

Kurz zu den Übernachtungen: Das Baumhaus, einfach hervorragend, tolle Lage, tolle Zimmer, Essen sehr gut und die Anlage schön gestaltet. Die zweite Nacht in der Bambushütte sehr minimalistisch aber vollkommen ausreichend, Abenteuer pur und zu empfehlen! Wer schläft schonmal umgeben von wilden Tieren und deren Lauten in völliger Dunkelheit (auch toll um Sterne anzusehen!) und fragt sich, was wohl gerade um die Hütte schleicht. Aber keine Angst, der Rancher und Guide waren direkt nebenan 😉

Vielen Dank für die unvergesslichen Abenteuer und klare Weiterempfehlung!!!
reviews.title: Khao Sok 3 Tage-Tour

reviews.text: Gut organisierter Flughafentransfer, das Team war sogar so nett und hat unseren gebuchten Transfer auf den nächsten Tag legen können, da wir einen Zwischenstopp in Bangkok machen mussten. Auch die neue Ankunftszeit war kein Problem. Wir haben auch gleich bei der Buchung den Rücktransfer mit gebucht.
reviews.title: Angenehmer Hoteltransfer
reviews.review_of: Phuket Airport Khao Lak Private Minibus Transfer

reviews.text:
We did two tours with this provider, Similan and James Bond Island (private tour)! Both were perfectly organized, great tour guides (TIM and FABIO), from whom we also learned a lot about the country and people.
(PS: Due to Corona we were of course “lucky” that very few people were at the hotspots)!

CONCLUSION: Better to spend a little more and not sit in the crowded speedboats that arrived after us on the Similan Islands!
reviews.title: Top!!!

reviews.text:
Ja, ja die Werbung suggeriert immer wieder tolle Events.
Wir haben am 14.11.2021 eine Tour Khao Lak Land Discovery gebucht und sollten um 06:50 Uhr abgeholt werden. Einen Tag vorher wurden wir angerufen, dass wir um 07:15 Uhr (ich habe extra nachgefragt 0-7-1-5) abgeholt werden – nur um dann festzustellen, dass wir um kurz nach 08:00 Uhr abgeholt werden.

Die Tour wird super beschrieben - leider alles gelogen! 
Dort heißt es, dass sie früh abgeholt werden, um die Hektik am Hafen zu entgehen und das sie eine eigene Anlegestelle haben. 
Haha, Fakt ist das wir in einem Riesenraum mit knapp 500 Touristen gefrühstückt haben und dann gegen 09:30 Uhr mit vier Booten zu jeweils 100 bis 120 Personen losgefahren sind. Im Boot waren, wie gesagt, knapp 120 Personen und der Abstand pro Person betrug wenige Zentimeter. Nicht wenige Touristen (meistens die Deutschen) hatten die Maskenpflicht während der gesamten Fahrt ignoriert.
Wir sind dann knapp 80 Minuten später angekommen. Hatten dann zwei kurze Stopps von maximal 40 Minuten gemacht, wo sie dann in überwiegend toten Riffen Schnorcheln konnten und zwei Stopps auf zwei Inseln von circa 45 Minuten gehabt. Dann ging es wieder in 80 Minuten zurück.

Ich fühle mich von diesem Veranstalter getäuscht und würde, wenn Sie in Deutschland Ihren Sitz hätten, mich an die Verbraucherzentrale wenden, bzw. wegen Kundentäuschung klagen!

Zitat auf der Webseite: „Wir fahren mit eigenen Speedbooten zu den Inseln und können eine entsprechende Qualität garantieren. Wir wollen keine minderwertigen Touren anbieten.“

Ehrlich gesagt, war ich maßlos enttäuscht. Der Strand ist schon schön, aber Du bist da nicht alleine! Und überall sind Touristen auf der Insel und Corona Vorsichtsmaßnahmen umzusetzen sind bei dieser Massenveranstaltung sicherlich ein großes Problem.
reviews.title: Finger weg von diesem Unternehmen! Sie vermitteln anscheinend nur weiter!

reviews.text:
In February we did a total of three beautiful tours with this organizer. Surin Isands, Safari and Khao Sok Day Tour.
We can recommend these without restriction. The tour guides were all very friendly, courteous and humorous. At this point high praise and best regards to Michael, Sam and Thomas. 
Pick up at the hotel on time. Prices reasonable. German speaking. Informative. Fresh fruit, delicious lunch, cool drinks. But above all, memories that you never forget. Thanks for that!
We will come back and try the other offers..

Norman and Elli :)
reviews.title: Unrestricted recommendation !

reviews.text:
A great organized trip to Surin. 
It all worked out. Everything went perfectly during our trips to James Bond Island and Khao Lak Safari. Thanks also to the guides Michael and Olli. Great job! We will come back.
reviews.title: Everything great!

reviews.text: Wir waren im März im Laguna Resort Khao Lak, unsere Betreuerin Vorort war die Thailänderin Numi vom Khao Lak Land Discovery. Da sich während unseres Urlaubs das Coronavirus in Europa immer mehr ausbreitete und wir deshalb unseren Urlaub frühzeitig abgebrochen haben, möchten wir uns hiermit nochmals ganz herzlich bei Numi bedanken, die uns kompetent und persönlich bei der Umbuchung unseres Fluges unterstützte. Wir sind sehr gerne in Khao Lak und werden sicher wieder kommen.
reviews.title: Danke an Numi für ihre tolle Unterstützung !!

reviews.text: Did the Off Road Safari. Nice, entertaining guide. The tour was interesting and entertaining. Personally, I liked the paddle ride the best.
reviews.title: Interesting

reviews.text:
Zuverlässig und sehr Kulant.
Wir kommen wieder und buchen erneut bei Landdiscovery
Danke an das Team
reviews.title: Danke gerne wieder

reviews.text:
Wir wurden für diese Tour morgens um 4:50 abgeholt und haben bei der Fahrt mit dem Longtail Boot einen tollen Sonnenaufgang erlebt. Anschließend sind wir mit den Kanus in die Lagunen der Hong Insel gefahren und waren dabei völlig unter uns aufgrund der frühen Uhrzeit. Gegen Mittag waren wir zum Mittagessen auf Koh Panyee (ein indonesisches Dorf, das komplett auf Stelzen erbaut wurde). Das Mittagessen war sehr gut und ich als einzige Vegetarierin habe ein extra Menü zubereitet bekommen :)
Zu guter letzt haben wir (nach einem kurzen Zwischenstopp bei wildlebenden Affen im Park) einen Tempel besucht und ein bisschen über buddhistische Rituale erfahren.
Die Tour war sehr gut organisiert und war seinen Preis wert.
reviews.title: Hong Insel / Phang Nga Bucht Tour

reviews.text:
Sind bereits das dritte mal mit Khao Lak Landdiscovery gefahren.
Sehr zuverlässig beim Termin. Immer gut zu erreichen. Fahrzeuge Top gepflegt. Sehr freundliches Personal (Büro, Fahrer und Tourguide).
Bereits den Service für 2020 gebucht. Gebe es einen sechsten Stern hätte ich den auch vergeben.
reviews.title: Top Transfer
reviews.review_of: Phuket Airport Khao Lak Private Minibus Transfer

reviews.text:
2 weeks ago my boyfriend and I did the Surin Tour and we are still thrilled! At the pier we had a small breakfast before we went on the speedboat. The organization was great from start to finish and you always felt very safe. With the three snorkel stops in different places it was never too crowded with other tourists and you could look at great corals and fish. For us the highlight was the beautiful beach on the island and the crystal clear, turquoise water - just a dream! Here you can really speak of paradise!
Due to the early arrival time at the island we were, as promised, one of the first boats and thus had the beach almost to ourselves. Only when we drove back again the other guests came and it became full. So here too, a big praise to Khao Lak Land Discovery. We will definitely come back to you!
reviews.title: Wonderful beach and crystal clear water!

reviews.text:
We (+ our two "big" children) were on the 11.02.20 for two days with Rolo. Everything super organized. Rolo is very nice and knows what he is doing.
The accommodation simple but TOP! No cell phone reception, no electricity at a later hour, no shower with its own toilet....you don't need that here. For me it was an experience as evening or even in the morning nature with the many animals came forward. At 4:30 the monkeys were doing gymnastics above our cabin in the trees ;-). You can't describe it......you just have to do it.
Big praise to Rolo....stay as you are!
reviews.title: A dream of landscape, animals, experiences and peace

reviews.text: Besonderen Dank an Mr. Harries der uns viele Tipps gab und bei der Tourenplanung (Phuket) weitergeholfen hat. Unsere private Tour nach Phuket begann pünktlich und fand zu 100% nach unseren Wünschen statt.
reviews.title: Dank an Mr.Harris

reviews.text: Small group led in perfect German. At every station, you were among yourself and it was never overflowing. The staff competent and friendly, the guide scored with excellent expertise and humor. From now on ONLY Khao Lak Land Discovery!
reviews.title: Never again where Anders

reviews.text: Wir waren auf der Sunset Dolphin Cruise. Es war super!Mit Oli, dem Tourguide, war es sehr lustig. Wir haben geangelt, den Sonnenuntergang angeschaut und nachher ein leckeres Abendessen genossen.
reviews.title: Sunset Dolphin Cruise

reviews.text: Wir haben die Tour jetzt das zweite Mal gemacht, es bereitet immer wieder sehr viel spass und freude. Wir haben es richtig genossen. Unser deutschsprachiger Tourguide namens Sam war grossartig! Wir haben extrem viel über die Elefanten, über Kultur und Religion  erfahren. Der Ausflug ist unserer Meinung ist empfehlenswert, wenn man viel spass haben möchte.
reviews.title: Grossartige Elefantenbaden

reviews.text: Die Tour ist eine Halb-Tages-Tour. Wir wurden um 8 Uhr am Hotel abgeholt und fuhren ins Welfare Center zum Elefganten streicheln/füttern und baden. Wir bekamen sehr viel Informationen über die wunderschönen Dickhäuter und hatten jeden Menge Spaß. Kurz vor Mittag waren wir wieder im Hotel. Hier wird sehr auf die Tiere geachtet - was uns gut gefallen hat.
reviews.title: Elefantenbaden im Welfare Center

reviews.text:
Die 3-tägige Tour, geführt von Rolo, haben wir sehr genossen.
Alles in allem war die Tour wunderschön, unterhaltsam, lehrreich und entspannt. Ein sehr schönes natürliches Erlebnis, an das wir lange und gerne denken werden.
Wir können nur raten, es auch zu machen 🤗👌🏻👍🏻👍🏻
reviews.title: 3 Tage mit Guide Rolo

reviews.text: We were on tour with Rolo for two days. Perfect organization, competent guide and magnificent nature. Thank you, Rolo.
reviews.title: Khao Sok

reviews.text:
Wir waren eine kleine Gruppe zu 5 Leuten, es gab immer überall genug Zeit. Die Kanufahrt durch den Khao Sok Nationalpark war beeindruckend und es gab einige Tiere zu sehen, Affen, Schlangen, Spinnen. Das Mittagessen war lecker als auch reichlich und fand in toller Umgebung statt. Gekühlte Getränke waren auch inklusive. Das Elephantenbaden fand in einer kleinen Anlage statt, es waren nicht viele Leute dort. Wir hatten zu zweit einen Elephanten zum Baden und die Familie ebenfalls einen eigenen. Wir empfanden das die Tiere dort gut versorgt wurden, es gab auch keine Wunden oder Ähnliches bei den Elephanten zu sehen. Gebadet wurde in sauberem Wasser. 
Unser Reiseleiter sprach Deutsch, es gab auch immer wieder interessante Landesinformationen.
Wir können diese Tour nur empfehlen!
Danke für den schönen Urlaubstag!
reviews.title: Khao Sok und Elephantenbaden

reviews.text: Transfer vom Flughafen Phuket zum Hotel nach Khao Lak und im Januar wieder zurück hat absolut einwandfrei geklappt. Wir (6 Personen) waren sehr zufrieden und können dieses Unternehmen wärmsten empfehlen. Kontakt fand nur über Intrnet statt, alles problemlos. Super Service, vielen Dank
reviews.title: Flughafentransfer
reviews.review_of: Phuket Airport Khao Lak Private Minivan Transfer

reviews.text:
We had 2 super nice days in Khao Sok National Park. For nature lovers just the thing! 
The organization was top. 
Anyone who wants to watch wild animals will definitely see some here. Unfortunately we were a bit unlucky and could not see elephants, but monkeys, deer, owl, various birds and wild boars. 
It was still very impressive and exciting to hike through the jungle with Rolo and the Ranger. 
The cottages are great, no more than equipped with a mattress, pillows and blankets. At night you have to go to the toilet with a flashlight. 
Those who love the adventure will love it there too. 
It was a great time, thanks to Rolo and Nong (captain). I would love to come back 😊😊😊
reviews.title: Great experience

reviews.text:
Kleine Gruppe, super Leute. Das Elefanten-Baden und die Kanu-Tour muss man unbedingt erlebt haben.
Der Auflug ist für uns unvergesslich. Einen großen Anteil hat daran unser Guide Michael, der nicht nur super lustig und freundlich ist, sondern auch  ein immenses Wissen über die Gegend bzw. über Thailand hat.
reviews.title: Khao Sok Tagesausflug

reviews.text:
Wir haben die 2 Tage Khao Sok Wildlife Tour mit Rolo gemacht. Ein sehr beeindruckendes Erlebnis. Rolo ist ein perfekter Guide und Fährtenfinder. Er findet seinen Kumpel 'Elefant' immer, wie auch die Gauren, Adler, und und und. Die Tour war perfekt organisiert. Die Unterbringung am See ist einfach aber nett, das Essen hervorragend, die Mitarbeiter sind sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. 
Die Wanderung durch den Dschungel wurde von Rolo und einem bewaffneten Ranger begleitet - safety first. Und das Bad im See am Ende des Tages, ersetzt die nicht vorhandene Dusche.
Wir hatten viel Spaß. Vielen Dank Rolo, Du hast das super gemacht. Herzlichen Dank auch an die Küche, den Bootsführer, die Ranger und alle, die an der Organisation beteiligt sind. Die Tour lohnt sich absolut.
reviews.title: Wunderschöne Dschungel Tour mit Rolo

reviews.text:
Sehr ausführliche kompetente Beratung im Büro, super Ausflüge. 
Wir haben die Tour zu den Hong Islands gebucht und waren begeistert! Super organisiert, Abreise sehr früh aber das war auch gut so, wir waren somit nämlich überall die Ersten und konnten alles stressfrei besichtigen und kamen in den Genuss eines wunderschönen Sonnenaufgangs. Das Bootfahren war hat uns auch großen Spaß gemacht! Auf jeden Fall einen Trip wert. Fein war auch, dass wir eine kleine Gruppe von nur 10 Leuten waren, unser Guide bis zum Schluss dabei war und uns mit extra Informationen versorgt hat. 
Gestern waren wir bei den Surin Inseln zum Schnorcheln und obwohl dort wesentlich mehr Leute waren, war alles gut organisiert und unser Guide Denis war sehr freundlich und motiviert. Auch die Crewmitglieder waren sehr nett. 
Auf jeden Fall ist diese Organisation sehr zu empfehlen. Da wir mehrere Ausflüge gebucht hatten wurde auch Rabatt gewährt! Bin schon auf‘s Baden mit den Elefanten gespannt welches wir noch für nächste Woche geplant haben.
reviews.title: Sehr zu empfehlen

reviews.text: Sehr zuverlässig und pünktlicher Transfer von phuket nach Khao Lak. Auch die Ausflüge sind gut organisiert.
reviews.title: Transport

reviews.text:
Wir haben uns dazu entschlossen diese Tour zu unternehmen, da sie aus unserer Sicht das beste Preis/Leistungsverhältnis hat.

Gleich an erster Stelle: unser guide Michael, war unglaublich gut und kompetent, er hat uns in die kleinen Geheimnisse von Thailand eingeführt und dabei immer ein Lachen auf den Lippen gehabt. Falls es euch möglich ist, bucht ihn! 

Die Tour war super geplant, wie hatten wenig bis gar keine anderen Touristen um uns und waren daher eher alleine unterwegs. 

Wir können jedem die Tour und besonders unseren guide Michael ans Herzen legen!
reviews.title: Khao Sok 1 Tagestour

reviews.text: Alles wie es sein soll. Buchung über das Internet, Bezahlung über PayPal. Am Flughafen haben wir unseren Namen auf einem Schild gefunden. 5 min auf den Fahrer warten, einsteigen, fahren lassen. Fertig. Gerne wieder.
reviews.title: Fahrt vom Flughafen Phuket zum Hotel

reviews.text:
It was 2 eventful and super organized days. Everything was well organized, from pick-up at our hotel to transfer to our next hotel in Khao Lak. Sam was a very nice, courteous tourist guide. He constantly explained nature, animals, Thailand, its culture, its people and its customs without being intrusive. We spent the night at the comfortable Rock&Tree House, also a stunning hotel set amidst trees, which exceeded our expectations for an overnight stay in the tree house. The food there was also great.
The tours (longtail boat on the Ratchaprapha incl. hike in the rainforest, lunch and visit to a cave, river trip incl. traditional coffee break, visit to a temple and a local market as well as elephant bathing) were all included (as was the overnight stay) in the price for the 2 days. Everything was very well organized and structured and that even though we arrived deviating from the given days (Tuesday).

Communication in advance also worked great in this regard.

All in all it was 2 unforgettable days. Sam was great. I can only recommend it. I wish you many more customers after us:-)
reviews.title: 2-day tour in Khao Sok National Park

reviews.text:
Ich habe vergangenen Urlaub die Khao Sok Tagestour mitgemacht. Diese war ein wahres Erlebnis! Zunächst fährt man auf einen tollen traditionellen Markt, kein Vergleich  zu den Märkten in Khao Lak. Anschließend geht es weiter nach Khao Sok wo wir zunächst mit Elefanten ein Bad nehmen durften. Das war ein unvergessliches Erlebnis, es war toll zu wissen, dass es den Tieren gut geht und sie zu nichts gezwungen werden. Nur mit diesem Wissen wollte ich etwas mit Elefanten machen. Die darauf folgende Kanufahrt war ebenfalls super, wir wurden ca. 1 Stunde durch die Wildnis des Nationalparks gepaddelt und hatten währenddessen auch die Möglichkeit zu baden. Die Paddelguides waren super gut drauf und haben die Gäste gut amüsiert. Das Essen im Baumhaus war köstlich und es gab eine große Auswahl.

Die Tour war einwandfrei, mein Freund und ich hatten einen wunderbaren Tag und haben im Anschluss gleich noch 2 weitere Touren mit Khao Lak Land Discovery gebucht. 

Sehr zu empfehlen!
reviews.title: Khao Sok Tagestour war erstklassig

reviews.text:
If you want to learn a lot about Buddhist culture on your Thailand trip, I can really recommend the Amazing 3 Temple Tour.
Each temple on the tour is fascinating in its own way and has its own story to tell.
In between I could ask all the questions I had and got everything answered in detail.
An absolute must for anyone who wants to get involved with culture in Khao Lak.
reviews.title: Lots of interesting information on an exciting tour

reviews.text:
Wir haben die Übernachtungstour Wildlife auf dem Stausee gemacht und es war atemberaubend. Wenn man wirklich mal Natur erleben will und einfach mal dem Trubel von den Städten und den lauten Geräuschen entfliehen will, dann ist diese Tour wirklich das Richtige! 
Mitten auf dem Stausee im Khao Sok Nationalpark, abseits von den Massen und umgeben von Natur und Dschungel übernachteten wir in einfachen Bambushütten. Die Einheimischen vor Ort und der Tourguide waren immer sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit!
Während den Safaris haben wir verschiedenste Wildtiere wie Elefanten, Bisons sowie auch Affen gesehen. 
Die Ruhe und Natur hat uns wirklich überwältigt! Vielen Dank für diese tolle Tour!
reviews.title: Wildlife - eine Nacht auf dem Stausee!

reviews.text:
Wurden pünktlich vom Hotel mit einem kleinen Bus abgeholt.Waren dann insgesamt 9 Personen.Betreut wurden wir von einem deutschsprachigen Guide.
Zuerst fuhren wir zurAnlegestelle  des Longtale Bootes.Mit diesem fuhren wir durch einen Nationalpark mit wirklich wunderschöner Natur.
Der James Bond Felsen hatten wir uns grösser vorgestellt. Aber er ist halt schon sehr speziell.Gott sei Dank waren wir schon kurz vor 10 Uhr Morgens dort. Ab halb 11 kommen dann die Touristenmassen.
Da waren wir schon wieder unterwegs zum Kanu fahren. Für uns ein Highlight dieser Tour.Durch Mangroven Wälder mit natürlichen Grotten, es war sehr ruhig und sehr schön.Danach hatten wir ein Mittagessen in einem Muslimischen Dorf.War gut.
Zum Abschluss dann noch ein Besuch von einem Tempel.
Um 16 uhr waren wir wieder im Hotel.
Kostenpunkt pP.2900 Baht plus Trinkgeld.
reviews.title: Ausflug zum James Bond Felsen

reviews.text:
Ich habe nur den Transfer ab Flughafen Phuket zum Hotel und eine Woche später die Strecke zurück zum Flughafen gebucht. Die Kosten betrugen die Hälfte dessen, was ich bezahlt hätte, wenn ich den Transfer über das Hotel gebucht hätte. 

Ich kann Khao Lak Land Discovery uneingeschränkt empfehlen. Die Abholung lief beide Male total zuverlässig und reibungslos, die Autos waren ordentlich und der Fahrstil der Fahrer erschien mit einwandfrei und sicher.
reviews.title: Transfer Phuket Flughafen nach Khao Lak

reviews.text: Erst Kanufahrt durch den Dschungel. Dort Stop und dann haben die Kanuführer Kaffee und Tee in Bambusrohren zubereitet und jedem einen Bambusbecher mit Löffel geschnitzt, was natürlich auch etwas Zeit beansprucht hat. Weiterfahrt zum Mittagessen. Das war ok aber nicht überragend. Und schnell leer, ohne Nachschub. Weiterfahrt in ein Elefantencamp mit alten und kranken Tieren. Mit diesen durfte dann gebadet werden, man durfte sie schrubben und nach dem Bad mit Bananen füttern. Supi! Nicht gerade preiswert aber lohnenswert.
reviews.title: Elefantenbaden!

reviews.text:
Did a 3 day tour with Rolo. Lots of sights and experiences, including monkeys and elephants in the wild. For those who are looking for unspoilt nature without the tourism common in many other areas of Thailand - clear recommendation!
Best regards, Matthias & Kristina
reviews.title: Kao Lak Jungle Tour - Recommendation!

reviews.text: We booked 3 trips and all were perfect! Organization, professionalism and friendliness are really excellent. Phuket private, Hong Island and just 2 days Khao Sok make our holiday unforgettable! Special thanks to the best driver in Thailand: Tan, you are the ruler of the roads and Sam: we will NEVER forget your way of showing us your country!!! Thank you very much!!!🙏👍🏻🙏
reviews.title: Not cheap, but INEXPENSIVE!!!! TOPP!!!!

reviews.text: Nicht günstig, aber bei weiteren Entfernungen besser, als selbst organisierte Touren. Wir hätten manches nicht gesehen oder gefunden, wenn wir nicht die Tour gemacht hätten. Volker war ein sehr gute Guide!
reviews.title: Professionell geführte Ausflüge!

reviews.text: Ich kann die Agentur mit bestem Gewissen empfehlen. Seit Jahren buche ich meine Transfers von Phuket nach Khaolak und wieder zurück bei ihnen. Stets zuverlässig, pünktlich und sichere Fahrer.
reviews.title: Zuverlässig

reviews.text:
We are in Khao Lak for the second time and wanted to experience jungle. With Zeta and Eddi a really successful tour. Super organized. Prepared for anything. And drew attention to many things.
The all-round carefree package. With great guides.
reviews.title: Great tour great guides

reviews.text:
Wir haben bei unseren Besuch in Khao Lak insgesamt drei Touren bei Khao Lak Land Discovery gebucht. Wir hatten ein kleines Kind dabei (2.5 Jahre) weshalb wir in Bezug auf die Sicherheit besondere Ansprüche hatten.

Khao Lak Safarie: Tolle Tour, laut Veranstalter auch Kleinkindgeeignet. Leider gab es beim Bambus-Rafting trotz extra Bestellung keine Rettungsweste für Kleinkinder (!). Da wir die Tour in der Nebensaison gemacht haben und der Fluss deshalb auch einige Strömung hatte wäre das definitiv notwendig gewesen unserer Meinung nach. Dafür leider ein Stern abzug. 

Khao Sok Lake Tour: Für uns machbar gewesen. Dieses Mal gab es auch eine geeignete Rettungsweste für unseren Kleinen. Ich empfehle die Tour mit Kind einen Tragerucksack... Sonst wird die Dschungelwanderung zur Strapaze ;-). Ansonsten aber tolle Tour auch mit Kind.

James Bond Island: Auch hier gab es für unseren Lütten eine geeignete Weste. Die Tour war toll und ist auch mit Kleinkind problemlos machbar.

Fazit: Guter Veranstalter mit tollen Touren. Alle Transfers waren überpünktlich und die Guides sehr gut und alle deutschsprachig. Von daher für Familien mit großen Kindern und Paare uneingeschränkt zu empfehlen. Bei Kleinkindern sollte der Veranstalter mich etwas sensibler werden und bitte sicherstellen daß geeignete Rettungswesten vor Ort sind.
reviews.title: 3 Touren bei Khao Lak Land Discovery mit Kleinkind

reviews.text: Wir haben nur Transfer gebucht, waren aber jedes Mal sehr zufrieden. Am Flughafen haben sie mit unserem Namen auf einem Schild gewartet. Auch bei den jeweiligen Abholung and am Hotel waren sie mindestens 15 Minuten vor der geplanten Abfahrtszeit da. Außerdem wurde uns jedes Mal am Tag vorher die ab gemachte Zeit nochmals per Fax über das Hotel bestätigt. Super Service.
reviews.title: Sehr zuverlässig

reviews.text:
This tour is an absolute must for anyone who wants to holiday in the Khao Lak area and experience something very special. We spent 3 days with Rolo - a brilliant guide who knows the jungle and nature reserve super well and authentically lives and conveys the love for the animals and nature. Bathing and feeding the elephants on the first day was the first highlight of many! The overnight stay in the comfortable tree house was something very special, but the absolute highlight was the longtail boat ride on the reservoir through the fascinating landscape of Khao Sok National Park. On our three species of game we were lucky enough to see elephants up close several times and to observe, among other things, crooks, sambar deer, warblers and various bird species. However, the biggest adventure of this tour for us was the time we got to spend with the rangers. The unique atmosphere there, the warm people, the life in the untouched nature we will not soon forget. The rustic bamboo huts were equipped with a thick mattress, toilets and laundry facilities were also available.  

Thank you Rolo, for this great tour - it was incredibly great and impressive!
reviews.title: Khao Sok 3 Day Treehouse Reservoir - a great experience!

reviews.text:
Im Rahmen unseres Tagesausfluges haben wir einige Nationalparks und Wasserfälle in der nahen Umgebung von Khao Lak besucht, sowie eine Bootstour durch einen Mangrovenwald in Khao Lak gemacht. Dort konnten wie Vögel, Affen und Schlangen beobachten.

Die Abholung vom Hotel mit einem Mini-Bus lief reibungslos ab. Der englischsprechende Guide war sehr nett. Wir kehrten auch zwischenzeitlich zum Mittagessen in einem lokalen, thailändischen Restaurant ein, was die Reiseagentur ausgesucht hatte. Es schmeckte ebenfalls alles sehr gut.

Ich kann die Agentur Khao Lak Land Discovery sehr gut weiterempfehlen.
reviews.title: Interessanter Tagesausflug in die Nationalparks von Khao Lak

reviews.text:
We visited Khao Lak for the second time and wanted to learn about the temples and Buddhism this time. When we heard that our guide is a former monk and so we should know everything about it, we were already very pleased. It turned out, however, that he did not want to teach us the stories of Buddha, nor could he explain the philosophy behind Buddhism. It just meant he couldn't tell everything, so he told almost nothing. He also always ran ahead to the bus or temple so you couldn't talk. And last but not least, he conveyed to each of the questions feeling naive and asking inappropriate questions.
What a time and a waste of money!
reviews.title: 3 temples with former monk total failure

reviews.text: Wir haben 3 Tage mit Rolo die Wildniss im Nationalpark erleben dürfen, es war genial! Wir hatten eine Privat-Tour für unsere Familie, Rolo war unser Guide - absolut zu empfehlen, er hat alles so arrangiert, dass wir allen Touristenströmen aus dem Weg gehen konnten und ist toll auf unser individuellen Wünsche eingegangen - ein riesen Erlebnis für die ganze Famile, v.a. auch für die Kinder (7 und 9 J), die den Jungle zum ersten Mal erleben durften, absolut empfehlenswert! Danke Rolo!!!!!
reviews.title: Khao Sok Tour privat - mit Rolo

reviews.text: Wunderbare Touren die mit Topreiseführern durchgeführt werden. Den Unterschied zwischen einem 'Strassenkauf' werden sie bereits bei der ersten Tour spüren. Top organisiert und keine Blechhüttenverkostung wo man nicht weiss ob man lieber nichts isst. Des Weiteren ist Tierschutz und Natur gross geschrieben.
reviews.title: Touren mit Erlebnisgarantie

reviews.text: 2 Tages Tour mit Rolo zum Khao Sok Staussee. Ein unvergessliches Erlebnis mit unglaublicher Landschaft
reviews.title: Khao Sok Tour mit Rolo

reviews.text:
Wir haben die Transfer Angebote mehrerer Anbieter verglichen und uns letztendlich für Khao Lak Land Discovery entschieden, weil sie im August (Low Season) einen sehr guten Preis für die Hin-und Rückfahrt vom Flughafen Phuket zu unserem Moracea Khao Lak Hotel ausgewiesen hatten.

Dieser Transfer hat jeweils sehr gut funktioniert. Wir wurden pünktlich abgeholt bzw. am Flughafen/Hotel abgesetzt, und in einem sauberen Fahrzeug von einem sicheren Fahrer befördert.

Alles gut !
reviews.title: Reibungsloser Transfer vom Flughafen Phuket nach Khao Lak
reviews.review_of: Phuket Airport Khao Lak Private Minivan Transfer

reviews.text:
Our 3-day trip (no printing error, I expressly rate the 3-day tour here!) to the rainforest led again (my Third party KhaoSok trip) Rolo - it was just nice again! The program was slightly changed (elephant riding is no longer - now it goes in water with the thick skins, very nice!). The weather was really good despite the rainy season, we were totally lucky with it. Rolo explained a lot again, gave insider tips - you can feel that the rainforest is his "second home". Sometimes you might think that Rolo knows every tree there by now :D
Bathing with the elephants was very nice, you finally get really "on" the animals. You also get the impression that this is fun for the elephants - and: there are beautiful pictorial motifs!
At the lake it was also absolutely beautiful again, there are new cabins to sleep in, there are now really thick mattresses in there. But the overall flair up there on the lake is breathtaking without changing. Should everyone have done it once, you always realize how little you sometimes need in life. We have seen animals many, many more than in the previous years. Wild elephants, rhino birds, monkeys, white-tailed eagles, varans, crooks - there were also animals to discover for the night trip.
At Rock & Tree House it was also great again, the entire facility is a gem in its own right, who sees this for the first time and stands in front of it, first of all has this certain "wow effect" in which the rest of the world is faded out.
Food was very good, there is always something to drink anyway (the guides of KhaoLakLandDiscovery (KLLD) always have boxes of drinks on ice!).
Since we were there in the rainy season, the tours were not overbooked, so we then had a private tour with Rolo as a threesome. That was the icing on the cake, which made the tour especially valuable for us. Bad of course for KLLD that not so many people booked the trip.
Dear readers: I can only recommend it to everyone - if KhaoSok, then definitely the 3 days with KLLD! I have now to the 2. Once done, before that there was the 2 day tour. You have a lot more time here with the 3 days and can enjoy all this and get involved. Since you spend a lot of time in the car and on the boat, you should really treat yourself to the 3 days - no one will regret it, I promise!
Overall conclusion: for me (us) the really nicest excursion of KLLD (also very nice and recommended: Hong Island!), and the crazy thing is: we will book the 3 days next holiday in KhaoLak safely again, is just zuuuuuu beautiful!
The booking with KLLD worked excellently, we have already booked this from Germany, as it is sometimes better to definitely get the desired nights (with good booking situation you can just be out of luck). The advice and scheduling at KLLD is top - there is absolutely no problem here if you want to postpone an excursion for any reason. At KLLD you also look at the weather forecast and then try to find the best package for you with the guest. Also with all other problems (for me it was travel sickness) you always fall on open and above all helpful ears in the office of KLLD (just past the traffic light left side facing north).
At this point: lots of lovely greetings to Rolo (he did really great with a lot of love for things as always), to Lars and Paula from the KLLD office (totally nice and dear people who are absolutely attentive to the guests), it was 3 really nice days in the rainforest - a big THANK YOU to all of you from Annika & Co.:-)
reviews.title: 3 days Kaho Sok - so coooooooool :-)

reviews.text:
With the many offers Khao Lak provides, we decided to go on a wildlife tour with overnight stay in an artificially created treehouse area and a tour in the middle of the jungle - fortunately! 
After a two-hour drive, we took the Long Tail boat for another 2 hours into the deep jungle, far from any civilization. 
Once there, accommodation with simple bamboo cabins, water bungalows, a headquarters and super nice Thais awaited us. 

Led by the professional and super cool guide named Rolo, two long tail boat safaris and a jungle hike are conducted. Watching the wild jungle dwellers like elephants, monkeys, dragonflies, snakes and much more is the bright madness. 

Those who seek their adventure of a lifetime will find it there. We will never forget this two-day trip.
reviews.title: Wildlife Tour with Rolo- the best guide

reviews.text:
This tour in Khao Sok National Park meets all expectations to experience wild animals and the jungle experience. The property is 2 hours by longtail boat from the reservoir wall at the entrance. If you want to see the national park with its originality, you really can’t avoid this tour. The accommodation is accordingly simple and designed for an expedition. You sleep in a bamboo cabin overlooking the reservoir - just amazing. The food on site really impressed us as there were very delicious Thai dishes for breakfast, lunch and dinner. 

Thanks to the super nice and experienced guide Rolo, we saw an elephant, rare bird species, deer, bird spiders and much more during the wildlife observations. 

Thank you for this incredible experience!
reviews.title: Experience the jungle up close

reviews.text:
We did the tour in August, we were lucky enough that the three of us were alone with our guide Rolo and boatmaster Lu. The scenery you can admire on the way out is impressively beautiful. As expected it rained again and again but we were well equipped by Rolo with rain jackets and caoe. On our boat trips we still saw many animals in the wild. Elephant , gibbons, macaques..., white-tailed eagle, kingfisher, sea owl, gaur... The cottages we stayed in were dry and pleasant. There were , normal’ toilets and a shower in a washhouse. The food that was waiting for us after the excursions was good and plentiful .At the station you are allowed to rumpaddle with the canoes and can also go swimming very well.
It was a great experience even for our 11 year old son and we can recommend it to anyone!
reviews.title: Nature experience

reviews.text:
We went on the tour from May 10 - 11 and were incredibly lucky that we and our guide Rolo were alone.
It was a super great experience and despite some pouring rain we saw many animals ( elephants, warblers, gibbons, rhino birds and much more ). It was all super organized and also the food in the very simple "restaurant" was very good.
The overnight stay in the very simple bamboo hut we liked very much.
Overall, it was the highlight of our Thailand holiday and we can recommend it to anyone. 
Thanks again to our guide Rolo.

Kind regards from Romy and Frank
reviews.title: A super great experience with unforgettable impressions

reviews.text:
Wir hatten heute die Tagestour in Khao sok mit Elefanten Baden, Tempel und Kanufahrt. 
Alles in allem ok, aber für den Preis  wiederum viel zu wenig Service: mittagsbuffet war lieblos und gefällig zubereitet. Wer auf Thai Food steht wird enttäuscht.
